# Formal Template Schemas

Read only the reference for the selected template, then run validate before render.

- [Deep Research Report](./deep-research.md) — An evidence-heavy research report with an executive summary, findings, methodology, limitations, counterarguments, recommendations, and traceable sources.
- [Landing Page](./landing-page.md) — A document-style responsive landing page with a clear claim, supporting sections, and calls to action.
- [Research Summary](./research-summary.md) — A concise research deliverable organized around a question, findings, implications, method, limitations, and traceable sources.
